title: elaeocarpus ilocanus
intro: Elaeocarpus ilocanus, also known as the Philippine blue tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus ilocanus include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Elaeocarpus ilocanus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Filipino medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
